case_title: S AND C MOTORS INC VS O'BRIEN, MAUREEN A.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT O'BRIEN, MAUREEN A.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,853.42 FILED BY S AND C MOTORS INC AS TO DEFENDANT O'BRIEN, MAUREEN A. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-14-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF S AND C MOTORS INC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT O'BRIEN, MAUREEN A. $1,853.42 PRINCIPAL, $70.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,923.42 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT O'BRIEN, MAUREEN A.
